course_title: INTRODUCTION TO THE THEORY OF PROBABILITY
description: Topics covered include axioms of probability, random variables, the most important discrete and continuous probability distributions, expectation and variance, moment generating functions, conditional probability and conditional expectations, multivariate distributions, Markov's and Chebyshev's inequalities, laws of large numbers, and the central limit theorem.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MATH 234or376or graduate/professional standing or member of the Pre-Masters Mathematics (Visiting International) Program
